content.text: Just released a new version of go-ipfs, v0.4.17! It contains a few goodies in preparation for the Decentralized Web Summit next week! Check out the changelog here: https://github.com/ipfs/go-ipfs/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#0417-2018-07-27
